_meta.description: Golden eval set for the wind-energy RAG. Each question lists substrings that MUST appear in retrieved chunks (retrieval check) and in the generated answer (answer check). Substrings are matched case-insensitively and ignore comma/space variation in numbers via answer-side normalization in run_eval.py.
_meta.corpus: Directory Indian Windpower 2025_Open.pdf (year 2025) — only PDF ingested as of 2026-05-25

questions.question: Which state had the highest installed wind capacity in 2025?
What are the top 3 states by installed wind capacity in 2025?
What was India's total installed wind power capacity as of 31 March 2025?
questions._note: PDF gives 50,038 MW (MNRE canonical) and 50,037.82 MW (state-table sum). Headline-fact chunk uses 50,038 — accept that as canonical.

questions.question: How many wind turbine manufacturers were offering WEGs in India as of July 2025?
questions._note: Headline fact chunk phrases it 'exactly 14 wind turbine generator (WEG) manufacturers'. Loosen chunk match to just '14' + 'manufacturer'.

questions.question: What was GE's contribution to wind power capacity during 2024-25?
What is the largest wind energy generator rating installed in India?
How many wind monitoring masts has NIWE installed?
How much electricity was generated from wind in 2024-25?
What share of India's installed power capacity came from non-fossil sources in March 2025?
questions._note: Model writes '46%' or '46 percent' — keep expectation format-agnostic.

questions.question: What percentage of India's 150m wind potential has been realised by 31 March 2025?
How many Senvion wind turbines are in MP?
questions._note: Tests state-abbreviation rewriting (MP -> Madhya Pradesh) + table retrieval. Senvion has 0 in MP per the cumulative State & Make table; answer should say so and ideally list states where Senvion DOES operate (Gujarat, Karnataka, Maharashtra, Tamil Nadu).

questions.question: How many Senvion turbines are installed in Gujarat?
questions._note: Cumulative table shows Senvion in Gujarat: 212 turbines / 535.6 MW.

questions.question: What was Suzion's contribution during 2024-25?
questions._note: Tests typo fix Suzion -> Suzlon. Expected: 336 MW (from manufacturer-contribution paragraph).

questions.question: How many wind monitoring masts are in Tamil Nadu?
questions._note: No TN-specific mast count in the PDF. Aggregate is 996 NIWE masts nationally + 18 KPCL in Karnataka + 80 NE telecom-tower sites. Helpful answer reports the aggregate AND notes no TN breakdown.

questions.question: How many turbines did Suzlon install in FY 2016-17?
questions._note: Fact-extracted from Make&Year-wise table. Suzlon FY 2016-17: 847 WEGs / 1778.700 MW.

questions.question: How many turbines did Suzlon install in 2016 and in which states?
questions._note: Ambiguous year mapping. 2016 -> FY 2015-16 (435) OR FY 2016-17 (847). Accept either. Bot should also acknowledge no per-year-per-state breakdown.

questions.question: How many WEGs did Siemens Gamesa install in FY 2020-21?
questions._note: Fact-extracted; corpus spells 'Siemense Gamesa' (OCR'd). Expected: 281 WEGs / 606.600 MW.

questions.question: How many wind turbines did Pioneer Wincon install upto March 2010 cumulatively?
questions._note: Fact-extracted. Pioneer Wincon Upto Mar 2010: 682 turbines / 170.100 MW.

questions.question: How many turbines installed by Inox Wind Ltd?
questions._note: Bot may answer cumulative (1589 from State&Make table) OR FY 2024-25 (98 MW from prose). Both valid. Just check Inox + 'turbine|MW' appears.

questions.question: How much wind capacity did GE add in India?
questions._note: Prose contribution chunk: GE 929 MW in FY 2024-25.
